verses.1: For the music director; on stringed instruments. A Maskil of David, when the Ziphites came and said to Saul, “Is David not keeping himself hidden among us?” Save me, God, by Your name, And vindicate me by Your power.
verses.2: Hear my prayer, God; Listen to the words of my mouth.
verses.3: For strangers have risen against me And violent men have sought my life; They have not set God before them. Selah
verses.4: Behold, God is my helper; The Lord is the sustainer of my soul.
verses.5: He will pay back the evil to my enemies; Destroy them in Your faithfulness.
verses.6: Willingly I will sacrifice to You; I will praise Your name, LORD, for it is good.
verses.7: For He has saved me from all trouble, And my eye has looked with satisfaction upon my enemies.
